repair_history.diagnosis:
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'P1'.: P1 is a connection, not a boolean expression; AGREE cannot use connection names directly in assume/guarantee -> Remove the data_flow_routing assumption
line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE cannot reference property names directly; must use property values or expressions -> Rewrite to use property value directly: "Sporadic"
line 67: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE cannot reference component implementation names directly in expressions -> Remove Q.Impl. prefix from Period property reference
line 67: Couldn't resolve reference to 'ms'.: AGREE does not support unit suffixes like 'ms' in expressions -> Use numeric value 10 for Period
line 68: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE cannot reference component implementation names directly in expressions -> Remove Q.Impl. prefix from deadline property reference

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: Dispatch_Protocol is an AADL property declared on Q.Impl (implementation), but the AGREE annex is attached to Q (type), where it is not visible. -> Move the AGREE annex from Q to Q.Impl
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: Period is an AADL property declared on Q.Impl (implementation), but the AGREE annex is attached to Q (type), where it is not visible. -> Move the AGREE annex from Q to Q.Impl
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 67: Couldn't resolve reference to 'deadline'.: deadline is an AADL property declared on Q.Impl (implementation), but the AGREE annex is attached to Q (type), where it is not visible. -> Move the AGREE annex from Q to Q.Impl
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 68: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: Priority is an AADL property declared on Q.Impl (implementation), but the AGREE annex is attached to Q (type), where it is not visible. -> Move the AGREE annex from Q to Q.Impl

Assume statements are allowed only in component types: AGREE annex in thread implementation attempts to use assume statement -> Move the assume statement to the component type Q
Guarantee statements are allowed only in component types: AGREE annex in thread implementation attempts to use guarantee statement -> Move the guarantee statements to the component type Q
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol': AGREE annex in thread implementation cannot reference implementation properties -> Remove reference to Dispatch_Protocol from AGREE annex
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period': AGREE annex in thread implementation cannot reference implementation properties -> Remove reference to Period from AGREE annex
Couldn't resolve reference to 'deadline': AGREE annex in thread implementation cannot reference implementation properties -> Remove reference to deadline from AGREE annex
line 85: Guarantee statements are allowed only in component types: AGREE guarantee statement in thread implementation annex -> Move the guarantee statement from Q.Impl annex to Q annex
named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE requires guarantee expressions to be valid boolean expressions, not just identifiers -> replace Data_Sink = Data_Sink with true
